basic_details.short_information: Haryana High Court Clerk Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 1265 vacancies. Candidates can apply online only from 26.05.2026 to 23.06.2026 through Haryana High Court website sssc.gov.in.

application_fee.details: Fee is non-refundable and must be paid online only. The Online Application Form will be submitted only after payment of fees. Application fee for "Others" (Transgender) category is applicable as per their category in the fee table below.

age_limit.details: Age is calculated as on 01.01.2026. The upper age limit for any candidate (except Ex-servicemen) shall not exceed 52 years even after availing all applicable age relaxations combined. Reservation benefits of age relaxation are only for bonafide residents of Haryana.

qualification.education_qualification: 23-06-2026 (closing date for submission of online applications)
qualification.details: Bachelor of Arts (BA) or Bachelor of Science (BSc) or equivalent degree from a recognized university. AND proficiency in computers (Word Processing and Spread Sheets).

exam_pattern.subject: General Knowledge
exam_pattern.marks: 33% in each subject individually; AND minimum 40% aggregate of both subjects. English Composition (Subjective) checked only for candidates who score 33%+ in General Knowledge.

how_to_apply: Personal details (Name, Date of Birth, Category, Sub-category etc.)
Valid and active Email ID (keep unchanged throughout the process - do not use email of unknown persons)
Valid and active mobile number (keep unchanged throughout the process)
Online payment facility - Internet Banking / Debit Card / Credit Card / UPI
Scanned recent passport-size photograph (not more than one month old, against white background)
Computer/device with inbuilt or attached webcam (for real-time photograph capture during application)
important_instructions: Candidates who do not hold a Bachelor's degree (BA/BSc or equivalent) from a recognized university - it is the mandatory minimum educational qualification.

Candidates who have not passed Matriculation with Hindi or Sanskrit as one of the subjects, AND have not done +2/BA/MA with Hindi as one of the subjects - both the degree AND the Hindi/Sanskrit condition must be fulfilled by 23-06-2026.

Candidates who are not bonafide residents of Haryana - reservation benefits (category, age relaxation, fee concession) are available only to Haryana residents with valid Haryana Government-issued certificates. Non-Haryana reserved category candidates must apply under General category.
Candidates who do not have proficiency in computers (Word Processing and Spread Sheets) - this is a mandatory qualification and is tested in the CPT.

Candidates above 42 years of age as on 01.01.2026 (for General category), except those eligible for specific age relaxation as per the rules - overall age cap is 52 years for most relaxation categories.

Candidates who have already married a person having a living spouse, or who (having a living spouse) have married another person - unless the Hon'ble High Court has specifically exempted such marriage under applicable personal law.

In-service Government employees who cannot produce a No Objection Certificate (NOC) from their Head of Office or Department when called - failure to produce NOC will result in cancellation of candidature.
Candidates who cannot or will not commit to working anywhere in the State of Haryana - a mandatory undertaking to this effect must be given in the Online Application Form.

Candidates who entered incorrect information in the application - all particulars are sacrosanct after submission and no change is permitted at any stage; errors cannot be corrected or explained later.
Candidates who are unable to type the English Composition Subjective portion on computer and cannot qualify the CPT Typing Test at 30 WPM (unless eligible for CPT exemption under PwBD provisions).

faq.question: What is the total number of vacancies in Punjab and Haryana High Court Clerk Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The High Court of Punjab and Haryana has announced a total of 1265 Clerk vacancies under the Punjab and Haryana High Court Clerk Recruitment 2026. This includes 1015 existing posts and 250 anticipated vacancies up to June 2026. The number of vacancies may change depending on administrative requirements at the time of final selection

faq.question: What is the eligibility criteria for Haryana SSSC Clerk 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Bachelor’s degree (BA, BSc, or equivalent) from a recognized university along with basic computer proficiency in Word Processing and Spreadsheets. Additionally, applicants must have studied Hindi or Sanskrit at Matric level or higher. All qualifications must be completed before 23 June 2026.

faq.question: What is the age limit for Punjab and Haryana High Court Clerk Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 42 years for General category candidates as on 01 January 2026. Reserved categories like SC, BC, PwBD, and others are eligible for age relaxation as per Haryana government rules. However, the upper age limit cannot exceed 52 years after all relaxations.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for Punjab and Haryana High Court Clerk Vacancy 2026?
faq.answer: The online application process will start on 26 May 2026 at 4:00 PM and will remain open until 23 June 2026 at 4:00 PM. Candidates are advised to complete their application well before the deadline to avoid last-minute technical issues. Late submissions will not be accepted under any circumstances.

faq.question: What is the selection process for Haryana High Court Clerk Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process consists of three stages: Computer Based Test (CBT), Computer Proficiency Test (CPT), and document verification. The final merit list is prepared based on marks obtained in the CBT only. The CPT is qualifying in nature and must be cleared to proceed further.

faq.question: What is the exam pattern of Punjab and Haryana High Court Clerk CBT 2026?
faq.answer: The CBT includes General Knowledge and English Composition sections with both objective and subjective questions. The exam carries 100 marks with a duration of 2 hours, and there is negative marking of 1/4 for incorrect answers. Candidates must score at least 33% in each section and 40% overall to qualify.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for Haryana Clerk Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, the application fee varies based on category and gender. General category males need to pay Rs. 1200, while females pay Rs. 875. Haryana reserved categories pay Rs. 710, and PwBD candidates are exempted from paying any fee.

faq.question: Who can apply for Punjab and Haryana High Court Clerk posts under reserved categories?
faq.answer: Only bonafide residents of Haryana are eligible to claim reservation benefits under SC, BC, EWS, ESM, and other categories. Candidates from other states must apply under the General category even if they belong to a reserved category. Valid and updated certificates are mandatory at the time of application.

faq.question: What is the salary of Haryana High Court Clerk 2026?
faq.answer: The pay scale for Clerk posts will be as per the latest rules and instructions issued by the Government of Haryana. Along with basic pay, selected candidates will also receive allowances and benefits applicable to state government employees. The job is permanent and offers stable career growth.

faq.question: How to apply online for Punjab and Haryana High Court Clerk Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must apply online through the official website sssc.gov.in by completing registration, filling the application form, uploading documents, and paying the fee. It is important to keep scanned documents, a valid email ID, and a working mobile number ready before applying. The application is considered complete only after successful fee payment.
